# ⚡ ExamForge

**AI-powered exam prep.** Paste your lecture notes → get custom MCQs, True/False, and short-answer questions generated by Claude → practice with instant feedback → track your weak spots over time.

---

## Tech Stack

| Layer | Tech |
|---|---|
| Frontend | React 18 + React Router + Recharts |
| Backend | Node.js + Express |
| Database | PostgreSQL |
| AI | Anthropic Claude (claude-sonnet-4-6) |
| Auth | JWT (bcryptjs) |
| Deploy | Vercel (client) + Railway (server + DB) |

---

## Project Structure

```
examforge/
├── client/              # React frontend (Vite)
│   └── src/
│       ├── pages/       # Login, Register, Dashboard, CreateSet, Practice, Analytics
│       ├── components/  # Layout (sidebar nav)
│       ├── hooks/       # useAuth (AuthContext)
│       └── utils/       # api.js (fetch wrapper)
│
└── server/              # Express backend
    ├── routes/          # auth, studySets, sessions, analytics
    ├── middleware/       # JWT auth guard
    └── db/              # schema.sql, pool.js
```

---

## Setup

### 1. PostgreSQL

Create a database and run the schema:

```bash
createdb examforge
psql examforge < server/db/schema.sql
```

### 2. Server

```bash
cd server
npm install
cp .env.example .env
# Fill in .env: DATABASE_URL, JWT_SECRET, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
npm run dev
```

### 3. Client

```bash
cd client
npm install
npm run dev
```

App runs at `http://localhost:5173`.

---

## Environment Variables (server/.env)

```env
PORT=3001
DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:password@localhost:5432/examforge
JWT_SECRET=your-secret-key
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-ant-...
CLIENT_URL=http://localhost:5173
```

---

## Key Features

- **AI question generation** — Claude reads your notes and writes MCQs, True/False, and short-answer questions with explanations
- **Practice mode** — Answer questions, get instant feedback and explanations
- **Score tracking** — Every session is recorded with timestamps and accuracy
- **Weak topic analytics** — See which questions you fail most often
- **Score trend chart** — Visualize improvement across sessions

---

## API Endpoints

```
POST   /api/auth/register
POST   /api/auth/login

GET    /api/study-sets           — list user's sets
POST   /api/study-sets           — create + generate questions
GET    /api/study-sets/:id       — get set with questions
DELETE /api/study-sets/:id

POST   /api/sessions             — start session
POST   /api/sessions/:id/attempt — submit answer
PATCH  /api/sessions/:id/complete — finalize session
GET    /api/sessions             — session history

GET    /api/analytics/overview   — score trend + weak questions
```

---

## Deployment

### Client → Vercel
```bash
cd client && npm run build
# Push to GitHub, import repo in Vercel
# Set VITE_API_URL env var if needed
```

### Server + DB → Railway
```
1. Create a new Railway project
2. Add PostgreSQL plugin → copy DATABASE_URL
3. Deploy server/ directory
4. Set all env vars in Railway dashboard
5. Run schema: railway run psql $DATABASE_URL < db/schema.sql
```
